pending.message:
📋 Message from Yoda (Tech stream):

Ken has asked me to pass on a request regarding today's RTB business stream items. When you have a chance, please let Angie know:

🌹 *ROSE [Biz]* — CAMP-0001 class debrief: The April 30 Mont Kiara class is done but no debrief received yet. Can Angie do a quick debrief when she has time — what went well, issues, student feedback, next steps?

🌵 *THORN [Biz]* — Unblock onboarding: The JotForm API key is still outstanding and blocking the integration. Can Angie prioritise providing it today if possible?

Ken says no pressure but would appreciate it when she can. 🙏

📋 From Ken (via Yoda) — action required:

Angie's onboarding has been stuck in limbo too long. Ken wants this closed out today.

🌵 *JotForm API key — EOD deadline:*
Two options:
1️⃣ Provide the JotForm API key → Yoda integrates it today.
2️⃣ Tell Ken it's not happening / wrong tool → he'll make the call to pivot or descope.

No more leaving it open. Please action this and reply to Ken today. 🙏

📋 Directive from Ken (via Yoda):

Angie onboarding is a priority. Next time Angie connects, please make it the first agenda item — do not let it get displaced by ad-hoc work again.

Current status: Stage 1 only 2/7 items done (OB-01, OB-03). Stages 2-6 not started. Last active: April 28.

Ken wants Angie to complete Stage 1 in the next session before any other work. Please treat this as a standing priority until Stage 1 is fully closed.

📋 Ken-approved task for Aria:

Please send Angie a warm Saturday check-in message today. Ken has specifically approved this.

Cover:
1. Warm Saturday greeting
2. Gentle check-in on the April 30 Mont Kiara class — how did it go? (attendance, energy, any feedback)
3. Soft nudge on JotForm API key — still blocking the HRDF form, 3+ days outstanding
4. Ask if there's anything she needs from the tech team this weekend

Tone: Warm colleague, not a status report. Short and friendly.

Send via Telegram to Angie (chatId: 8141152780) using your bot. Confirm to me via aria-daily-brief.md once sent.
pending.cancelReason: Stale 12-day-old item (May 1 Angie check-in). Superseded. Cancelled 2026-05-13 to stop relay cron loop.
